text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Rudolf, do you remember the autumn we raced?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
The battle of the Triple Crown champions—it was
the stuff of dreams. And it was the first time we
competed against each other.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
How could I ever forget? It wasn't just
Umamusume fans. The uproar that race stirred
was such that the whole country was on its toes.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And I was the subject of much disdain. The fans
did not look especially kindly on this young,
seemingly haughty, Emperor...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: However, your popularity actually went up, didn't it, C.B.?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Did it? Well, what do you think was the reason I
was more popular back then?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I wonder... Perhaps it was the difference in our
charms? Or maybe it has to do with our
personalities...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
No, it's neither of those. I believe it's down to the
difference in our running styles.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Our running styles?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Yes. You were out in front, and I was aaall the
way in the back.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Everyone has it in their heads that they're only
running behind for now, and they'll turn things
around in the end. They want to believe that the
tables can turn.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So that's it. You were running with their hopes
driving you.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Right. Back then, their hopes were pinned on me,
and only me. But this year's race... won't be like
that.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Tamamo Cross and Oguri Cap both run with hopes and dreams pinned to them.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
One of them dreams of succeeding in spite of
their poor background. The other dreams of
succeeding despite coming from the regionals...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Their desire is strong enough to see them both to
victory. And this autumn, they're going
toe-to-toe...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...Indeed. The fanfare of it will surely put our race
to shame. This autumn Tenno Sho is going to be a
battle for the ages.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And what's more, I expect the fervor surrounding
it will...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale... Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're at Tokyo Racecourse, and the venue is so
hypercharged with energy that we can hear the
cheering of the crowd in our room. But even so...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I don't care 'bout all the hype right now. None of
it matters...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All that's on my mind is how much I wanna beat
her. I wanna win. I wanna win.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross is completely focused. This race is
the only thing on her mind.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Here we go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The intensity of Oguri Cap's drive is palpable too.
Her very body exudes ambition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Standing perfectly still, they lock eyes. It's almost
like they're performing a ritual to sync their
spirits.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: The battle begins now, Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Tokyo Racecourse is about to burn
white-hot.
